data.title: Regenx Tech Corp. delays Annual Filings, unable to meet deadline of July 29, 2025, due to audit completion delays.
data.description: Edmonton, Alberta, today, the technology company Regenx Tech Corp. (CSE: RGX) (OTCQB: RGXT) (FSE: YRS WKN: A2DSW3) reports delays in completing its audit. The company will miss the July 29, 2025, deadline to file its Annual Filings due to this delay.

data.title: First Savings Financial Group reported $6.2M net income for Q3 2025, up from $4.1M in Q3 2024. Diluted EPS rose from $0.60 to $0.88.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Jeffersonville, Ind., First Savings Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSFG) announced its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company, which is the parent of First Savings Bank, disclosed a net income of $6.2 million, translating to $0.88 per diluted share. In comparison, the same period in 2024 saw a net income of $4.1 million at $0.60 per diluted share. Adjusting for one-time items, the company's net income stood at $5.7 million and earnings per diluted share were $0.81 for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, a notable increase from $3.5 million and $0.52 per diluted share during the quarter concluding on June 30, 2024.

data.title: Trump increases pressure on Fed Chair Powell, visits Federal Reserve. Administration critiques Powell for economic performance and HQ renovation costs.
data.description: The administration has voiced numerous criticisms towards Jerome H. Powell, the central bank chair, regarding his management of the economy and the expenses associated with the institution’s headquarters.

data.title: Brag House receives $15 million through private placement with 12 investors, expanding Gen Z platform operations.
data.description: In New York on July 24, 2025, Brag House Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TBH) revealed its agreement with twelve accredited investors for a private investment in public equity ("PIPE") financing. Contrary to earlier reports, the investment involved multiple investors and is anticipated to bring in around $15 million in gross proceeds for Brag House. This excludes placement agent fees and offering expenses. Brag House focuses on the Gen Z engagement platform, combining gaming, college sports, and digital media.

data.title: Colabor Group Inc. reported Q2 2025 sales up 5.1% at $169.5M, net loss of $2.3M, adjusted EBITDA dropped to $5.4M.
data.description: Colabor Group Inc. reported its second-quarter results for 2025 with a 5.1% increase in sales to $169.5 million compared to $161.3 million in 2024. However, they reported a net loss from continuing operations of $2.3 million, a significant decrease from net earnings of $1.7 million in the same period last year. Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $5.4 million from $9.7 million, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 3.2% compared to 6% in 2024. Cash flow from operating activities decreased to $4.5 million, and net debt increased to $97.3 million from $47.8 million in December 2024. The company recently acquired the assets of Alimplus Inc. and entered into new debt agreements. Additionally, they identified a cybersecurity incident on July 20, 2025.

data.title: Stock of Edwards Lifesciences surged after rival Boston Scientific's setback, leading to Edwards hiked outlook. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: After a significant setback for rival Boston Scientific, Edwards Lifesciences experienced a surge in stock late on Thursday. The medical technology company raised its outlook, resulting in a substantial gain in the second quarter. This news comes after Boston Scientific faced challenges, showcasing a clear advantage for Edwards Lifesciences. This positive development led to a notable increase in the stock value.

data.title: S&P 500 hit high with Google success; Tesla dropped. Dow Jones Futures mixed. Trump and Powell disagreed.
data.description: In recent trading, the stock market experienced a variety of outcomes. Alphabet Inc., the company behind Google, led to gains for AI giants while Tesla saw a significant decline in its stock value. There was a disagreement reported between President Trump and Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. The S&P 500 hit a record high amidst this activity. Dow Jones Futures were affected by these movements in the market.

data.title: Climate activists accused of exploiting Jasper wildfire anniversary without due diligence on climate change evidence - Friends of Science Society.
data.description: A group called Friends of Science Society has criticized climate activists for linking climate change and wildfires inaccurately while taking advantage of the Jasper wildfire anniversary. They claimed that the International Court of Justice did not conduct thorough research on climate change evidence and relied on unverified experts. The advisory was passed unanimously without proper scrutiny.

data.title: FCC greenlights Skydance's merger with Paramount, marking a crucial step as deal navigates final obstacles.
data.description: Approval from the agency was one of the final obstacles for the deal, which was under intense examination from the Trump administration.

data.title: WesternU COMP-Northwest renamed Heatherington College of Osteopathic Medicine in honor of Jeff Heatherington.
data.description: In Lebanon, Oregon, on July 24, 2025, Western University of Health Sciences' College of Osteopathic Medicine of the Pacific-Northwest announced its renaming to Heatherington College of Osteopathic Medicine. This change honors Jeff Heatherington and the Heatherington Foundation for Innovation.

data.title: Get the latest on crypto trends: Updates on Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3, and crypto regulation. Stay informed!
data.description: Want to stay updated on the latest in the world of cryptocurrency? Here is a summary of today's key developments. Bitcoin has experienced a price shift of X%, affecting the overall market sentiment.
